message:
test(undo): add idempotency test for already-undone actions

Verify that UndoExecutor::execute() returns NotApplicable without
mutating undone_at or undone_by when the action was previously undone
by another operator. This prevents silent state corruption on retry
and is a precondition for exposing undo in the CLI where users might
retry or scripts might call undo redundantly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
